sys_script_client.description:
2.6 - moved messages into messages to ensure if changed Template would change also and for internationalization
// 2.5.13: 08.10.20 | KT | SEQ | STRY0076789: SEQ - Task Form - WAIT FOR SUBTASKS TO FINISH Flag Location and Information message
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Wait State Information Message Tasker - Wait State Warning Message Tasker - Wait State - Information - Approval type with Approval Subtask Tasker - Wait State Information - Task is no longer dependent on the completion of its Subtasks
sys_script_client.name: Task - onChange/onLoad - Waiting Msg
